summary: Scene flow audit + 3 test tasks executed. 1 CRITICAL BUG fixed (run_state not restored on continue). 7 findings (1 CRITICAL fixed, 2 HIGH, 2 MEDIUM, 2 PASS). 6 new tasks generated.

flow_checks.note: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: LOAD_PROFILE now also restores run_state into state['run']. Before fix: run_state was silently dropped, every continue started a fresh run.

orphan_scenes.note: Old game controller scene, no active incoming transitions. Needs fate decision.

dual_menu_issue.finding: Two menu scenes exist: Menu3DPC.tscn (active flow) and MenuPrincipal.tscn (separate script MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd). No incoming transitions to MenuPrincipal.tscn from Menu3DPC found. Possible dead scene.

hubscreen_run3d_orphan.finding: GameFlowController references HubScreen.tscn (SCENE_HUB) and Run3D.tscn (SCENE_RUN). Active flow uses HubAntre.tscn and BroceliandeForest3D.tscn. GameFlowController.setup() never called → these scenes are referenced only by dead code.

test_results.finding: LOAD_PROFILE action only restored state['meta'] — never called save_system.load_run_state(). An interrupted run was silently discarded on every continue.
test_results.fix_applied: merlin_store.gd:410-418: after loading meta, now calls save_system.load_run_state() and restores state['run'] if non-empty. Returns has_run flag.

invariants.ok_returns_true: PASS — return dict still has ok:true
invariants.run_state_restored: FIXED — state['run'] now populated from disk if interrupted run exists
invariants.no_run_overwrite_if_empty: PASS — load_run_state() empty dict guard: `if not run_state.is_empty()`

findings: GameManager._ready():673 creates MerlinStore via call_deferred('add_child', store) — TIMING RISK
BroceliandeForest3D._get_store():376 uses get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinStore') — may return null on first frame
BroceliandeForest3D has explicit fallback mode (line 369-371) — no null crash guaranteed
MerlinCardSystem NOT in autoloads — accessed via MerlinStore.card_system property (lazy init)
test_results.verdict_details: No null crash due to fallback, but first card draw may use degraded stub data if deferred add hasn't completed. LOW risk in practice (deferred executes before scene _ready() in Godot 4 autoload order).
test_results.recommendation: Consider synchronous add_child (without deferred) in GameManager to eliminate timing ambiguity.

findings: MerlinReputationSystem.get_available_endings():93 correctly checks >= 80.0 for each faction — PASS
faction_endings_available populated in all 3 check_run_end paths — PASS
GameFlowController._on_faction_ending_chosen():175 has correct logic (dedup, null guard, save) — LOGIC PASS
GameFlowController.setup() NEVER called → _store=null → recording silently skipped — RECORDING FAIL
test_results.blocked_by: E2E-DEAD-PATH-GAME-FLOW-CONTROLLER (priority 4) — setup() must be called for recording to work

findings: _on_faction_ending_chosen: save_profile called when _save_system not null — PASS
wire_end_screen() never called (requires setup()) — WIRING FAIL
test_results.blocked_by: Same as T-GDC-FACTION-ENDING-INTEGRATION — GameFlowController.setup() not called
